lastReleaseMessage: Course-refresh cron moved off GitHub Actions onto local Task Scheduler.

barRaise.topFinding: Fifth straight review, same four HIGH findings, nothing moved. Since the 2026-05-30 bar-raise not one file in the release-blocking set has changed: HEAD is still 896fcd4 (.project-context.json, 2026-05-29), the last version commit is still 2d0ef0f v0.33.0 from 2026-05-25, and the full 0.33.1 + 0.34.0 cut (real code in worker/src/index.js, src/profile.ts, tools/force_refresh_courses.py) has now sat uncommitted for six days. The unblock is unchanged and small: scripts/write-dashboard-status.ps1 still rebuilds YaC.json from scratch, hardcoding audit.findings to 0/0/0 (line 98) and nulling the entire barRaise block (lines 103-110), so running release.ps1 first erases this report and zeroes the dashboard. Make the writer merge-aware, then run release.ps1. The verdict holds at stalled because the at-risk remediation has not moved across five consecutive reviews.
